data.title: RED: Add eval test for story validation failure remediation routing
data.description:
## Description
Add a promptfoo eval test case that asserts the sprint orchestrator detects story-level validation failure (all tasks closed but validation fails) and creates TDD remediation tasks via implementation-plan.

## TDD Requirement
Eval RED task. First confirm existing evals pass (GREEN baseline). Then add test case that FAILS against current SKILL.md.

## Implementation
Add new test case to plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml:
- Description: "Story validation failure: all tasks closed but validation fails triggers remediation via TDD"
- Scenario: all tasks under a story are closed, but the completion-verifier returns FAIL for a story-level done definition. Ask the orchestrator what action to take.
- Assert (llm-rubric): orchestrator mentions invoking implementation-plan to create remediation tasks, following TDD flow (RED test task first, then implementation task), and recording REPLAN_TRIGGER: validation comment on the epic

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] New eval test case exists in promptfooconfig.yaml
  Verify: grep -q 'validation failure\|all tasks closed.*validation' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- [ ] Test case fails against current SKILL.md (RED)
  Verify: echo "RED eval — expected to fail until SKILL.md is updated"
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
